---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an addition or improvement to ApiTemplate
labels: enhancement
---

## Is Your Feature Request Related to a Problem?
A clear description of the problem you're trying to solve.

## Describe the Solution You'd Like
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives Considered
Any alternative solutions or features you've considered, and why you ruled them out.

## Additional Context
Any other context, mockups, or examples about the feature request.
